_note: Content archived 2026-04-13: Sport, Playlist and 3 Days cut from the 90-second core journey for pacing. One Day and District Quiz kept in RealityExtras.tsx. Re-introduce here if a deep-dive section is added later.

sports.label: Running
sports.detail: The Bosphorus shore paths stretch for miles. Sunrise jogs with seagulls as pace-setters.

sports.label: Football
sports.detail: Galatasaray, Fenerbahçe, Beşiktaş the city has three top-flight clubs and a legendary derby.

sports.label: Hiking
sports.detail: Belgrad Forest and the Princes' Islands offer trails within 30 minutes of the city centre.

sports.label: Swimming
sports.detail: Black Sea beaches to the north, Marmara coves to the south the city is surrounded by water.

sports.label: Cycling
sports.detail: Dedicated bike lanes on Kadıköy's waterfront and the newly opened cycling routes along the Bosphorus.
